title: Subagent Spawn Payload
description: G7 typed payload for orchestrator → subagent delegation. Embedded in the Agent tool prompt. Validated by subagent-start-budget.py hook (B8). Replaces free-form HANDOFF text from team-protocols. See 01-WORKFLOW-SPECS.md Common Patterns + Round 6 HIGH-2 (memory-curator operational contract example).

trace_id.description: Globally unique spawn ID. Format: <origin>-<run-id>-<kind>-<seq>. Used for span tracing across spawn chains.

parent_trace_id.description: Trace ID of the spawn that initiated this one. Set to the parent's trace_id when a subagent spawns another subagent. Omit or set to null for top-level spawns from the main thread. Used by subagent-depth-guard.py (Phase 4 #4, v0.1.7) to enforce the bounded-recursion guarantee from subagent-isolation.md (max depth = userConfig.subagent_max_depth, default 3).

subagent_role.description: Role name from role-selection-table.md. MUST match a plugin-shipped agent name in plugin/agents/ OR a built-in Claude Code agent (Explore, Plan, general-purpose).

required.description: If true and the spawned agent fails, the entire workflow fails. If false, orchestrator continues without this subagent's output.

goal.description: One-sentence objective for the subagent. Imperative voice. Concrete deliverable.

constraints.description: Hard rules the subagent must follow. Inherited from project (CLAUDE.md), parent skill, and orchestrator decisions.

state_slice.description: Per-role context slice from /context-load --for <role>. Reduces per-agent setup tokens vs full project dump.

allowed_tools.description: Tool names the subagent may use. Subset of agent's frontmatter `tools` (intersection — orchestrator may further narrow). Matches Claude Code tool names: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, Write, Edit, Task, etc.

max_input_tokens.description: Per-spawn input token cap. Enforced by subagent-start-budget.py hook against session token meter.

max_output_tokens.description: Per-spawn output token cap. Per-role recommended values in plan §2.2 (300-2500 depending on role type).

max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on tool invocations within this subagent run.

max_turns.description: Hard cap on agent turns. Most subagents converge in 1-5; higher caps for /develop, /feature-design lead.

retry_budget.description: Number of retries allowed if subagent returns status:failed.

source.description: Provenance label: L2:<file>, L4:<path>, tool:<Tool>:<call_id>, subagent:<role>:<spawn_id>

wrapped.description: Whether content is already wrapped per untrusted-content-wrapping rule (G1). Should always be true unless explicitly trusted.

untrusted_inputs.description: Manifest of untrusted inputs included in state_slice. Per untrusted-content-wrapping rule, all L0/L2/L4 reads + tool outputs >200 tokens MUST be wrapped before injection.
